practice_description: The organization scans for counterfeit information system components in accordance with organization-defined frequency.

name: SA-19.1
practice_description: The organization develops an anti-counterfeit policy that includes the means to detect counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.10
practice_description: The organization defines the external reporting organizations to which counterfeit information system components are to be reported.

name: SA-19.11
practice_description: The organization defines the personnel or roles to whom counterfeit information system components are to be reported.

name: SA-19.2
practice_description: The organization develops an anti-counterfeit policy that includes the means to prevent counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.3
practice_description: The organization develops anti-counterfeit procedures that include the means to detect counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.4
practice_description: The organization develops anti-counterfeit procedures that include the means to prevent counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.5
practice_description: The organization implements an anti-counterfeit policy that includes the means to detect counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.6
practice_description: The organization implements an anti-counterfeit policy that includes the means to prevent counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.7
practice_description: The organization implements anti-counterfeit procedures that include the means to detect counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.8
practice_description: The organization implements anti-counterfeit procedures that include the means to prevent counterfeit components from entering the information system.

name: SA-19.9
practice_description: The organization reports counterfeit information system components to the source of the counterfeit component, organization-defined external reporting organizations, and/or organization-defined personnel or roles.

name: SA-2.1
practice_description: The organization determines information security requirements for the information system or information system service in mission/business process planning.

name: SA-2.2
practice_description: The organization determines the resources required to protect the information system or information system service as part of its capital planning and investment control process.

name: SA-2.3
practice_description: The organization documents the resources required to protect the information system or information system service as part of its capital planning and investment control process.

name: SA-2.4
practice_description: The organization allocates the resources required to protect the information system or information system service as part of its capital planning and investment control process.

name: SA-2.5
practice_description: The organization establishes a discrete line item for information security in organizational programming documentation.

name: SA-2.6
practice_description: The organization establishes a discrete line item for information security in organizational budgeting documentation.

name: SA-20.1
practice_description: The organization defines the critical information system components to re-implement or custom develop.

name: SA-20.2
practice_description: The organization re-implements or custom develops organization-defined critical information system components.

name: SA-21(1).1
practice_description: The organization defines the actions the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service must take to ensure the required screening criteria are satisfied.

name: SA-21(1).2
practice_description: The organization defines the actions the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service must take to ensure the required access authorizations are satisfied.

name: SA-21(1).3
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service take organization-defined actions to ensure the required screening criteria are satisfied.

name: SA-21(1).4
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service take organization-defined actions to ensure the required access authorizations are satisfied.

name: SA-21.1
practice_description: The organization defines the information system, system component, or information system service which requires the information system developer to have appropriate access authorizations and satisfy additional personnel screening criteria.

name: SA-21.2
practice_description: The organization defines the official government duties to be assigned to the developer of an organization-defined information system, system component, or information system service.

name: SA-21.3
practice_description: The organization requires that the developer of an organization-defined information system, system component, or information system service have appropriate access authorizations as determined by assigned organization-defined official government duties.

name: SA-21.4
practice_description: The organization defines additional personnel screening criteria that must be satisfied by the developer of an organization-defined information system, system component, or information system service.

name: SA-21.5
practice_description: The organization requires that the developer of an organization-defined information system, system component, or information system service satisfy organization-defined additional personnel screening criteria.

capability_description: Unsupported System Components | Alternative Sources for Continued Support
name: SA-22(1).1
practice_description: The organization defines the support from external providers to be provided for unsupported information system components.

capability_description: Unsupported System Components | Alternative Sources for Continued Support
name: SA-22(1).2
practice_description: The organization provides in-house support and/or organization-defined support from external providers for unsupported information system components.

name: SA-22.1
practice_description: The organization replaces information system components when support for the components is no longer available from the developer, vendor, or manufacturer.

name: SA-22.2
practice_description: The organization documents approval for the continued use of unsupported system components required to satisfy mission/business needs.

name: SA-22.3
practice_description: The organization provides justification for the continued use of unsupported system components required to satisfy mission/business needs.

name: SA-3.1
practice_description: The organization manages the information system using an organization-defined system development life cycle that incorporates information security considerations.

name: SA-3.2
practice_description: The organization defines a system development life cycle that is used to manage the information system.

name: SA-3.3
practice_description: The organization defines and documents information system security roles and responsibilities throughout the system development life cycle.

name: SA-3.4
practice_description: The organization identifies individuals having information system security roles and responsibilities.

name: SA-3.5
practice_description: The organization integrates the organizational information security risk management process into system development life cycle activities.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Functional Properties of Controls
name: SA-4(1).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to provide a description of the functional properties of the security controls to be employed.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Use of Approved PIV Products
name: SA-4(10).1
practice_description: The organization employs only information technology products on the FIPS 201-approved products list for Personal Identity Verification (PIV) capability implemented within organizational information systems.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to provide design information for the security controls to be employed that includes security-relevant external system interfaces, high-level design, low-level design, source code, hardware schematics, and/or organization-defined design information at an organization-defined level of detail.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).2
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to provide implementation information for the security controls to be employed that includes security-relevant external system interfaces, high-level design, low-level design, source code, hardware schematics, and/or organization-defined implementation information at an organization-defined level of detail.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).3
practice_description: The organization defines the design information that the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service is required to provide for the security controls to be employed.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).4
practice_description: The organization defines the implementation information that the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service is required to provide for the security controls to be employed.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).5
practice_description: The organization defines the level of detail for the design information of the security controls that is required to be provided by the developer of the information system, system component, or information system services.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Design and Implementation Information for Controls
name: SA-4(2).6
practice_description: The organization defines the level of detail for the implementation information of the security controls that is required to be provided by the developer of the information system, system component, or information system services.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Development Methods, Techniques, and Practices
name: SA-4(3).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to demonstrate the use of a system development life cycle that includes organization-defined state-of-the-practice system/security engineering methods, software development methods, testing/evaluation/validation techniques, and quality control processes.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Development Methods, Techniques, and Practices
name: SA-4(3).2
practice_description: The organization defines the state-of-the-practice system/security engineering methods, software development methods, testing/evaluation/validation techniques, and quality control processes that the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service is required to include when demonstrating the use of a system development life cycle.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | System, Component, and Service Configurations
name: SA-4(5).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to deliver the system, component, or service with organization-defined security configurations implemented.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | System, Component, and Service Configurations
name: SA-4(5).2
practice_description: The organization defines the security configurations required to be implemented when the developer delivers the information system, system component, or information system service.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | System, Component, and Service Configurations
name: SA-4(5).3
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to use the organization-defined security configurations as the default for any subsequent system, component, or service reinstallation or upgrade.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Use of Information Assurance Products
name: SA-4(6).1
practice_description: The organization employs only government off-the-shelf (GOTS) or commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) information assurance (IA) and IA-enabled information technology products that compose an NSA-approved solution to protect classified information when the networks used to transmit the information are at a lower classification level than the information being transmitted.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Use of Information Assurance Products
name: SA-4(6).2
practice_description: The organization ensures that government off-the-shelf (GOTS) or commercial-off-the-shelf(COTS) information assurance (IA) and IA-enabled information technology products have been evaluated and/or validated by the NSA or in accordance with NSA-approved procedures.

name: SA-4(7).1
practice_description: The organization limits the use of commercially provided information assurance (IA) and IA-enabled information technology products to those products that have been successfully evaluated against a National Information Assurance Partnership (NIAP)-approved Protection Profile for a specific technology type, if such a profile exists.

name: SA-4(7).2
practice_description: The organization requires, if no NIAP-approved Protection Profile exists for a specific technology type but a commercially provided information technology product relies on cryptographic functionality to enforce its security policy, that the cryptographic module is FIPS-validated.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Continuous Monitoring Plan for Controls
name: SA-4(8).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to produce a plan for the continuous monitoring of security control effectiveness that contains an organization-defined level of detail.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Continuous Monitoring Plan for Controls
name: SA-4(8).2
practice_description: The organization defines the level of detail to be contained in the plan for the continuous monitoring of security control effectiveness that the developer of the information system, system component, or information system services is required to produce.

capability_description: Acquisition Process | Functions, Ports, Protocols, and Services in Use
name: SA-4(9).1
practice_description: The organization requires the developer of the information system, system component, or information system service to identify early in the system development life cycle, the functions, ports, protocols, and services intended for organizational use.

name: SA-4.1
practice_description: The organization includes the security functional requirements, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.2
practice_description: The organization includes the security strength requirements, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.3
practice_description: The organization includes the security assurance requirements, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.4
practice_description: The organization includes the security-related documentation requirements, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.5
practice_description: The organization includes requirements for protecting security-related documentation, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.6
practice_description: The organization includes description of the information system development environment and environment in which the system is intended to operate, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-4.7
practice_description: The organization includes acceptance criteria, explicitly or by reference, in the acquisition contract for the information system, system component, or information system service in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, guidelines, and organizational mission/business needs.

name: SA-5.1
practice_description: The organization obtains administrator documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes secure configuration of the system, component, or service.

name: SA-5.10
practice_description: The organization defines actions to be taken in response to attempts to obtain either unavailable or nonexistent documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service.

name: SA-5.11
practice_description: The organization documents attempts to obtain information system, system component, or information system service documentation when such documentation is either unavailable or nonexistent.

name: SA-5.12
practice_description: The organization protects information system, system component, or information system service documentation as required, in accordance with the risk management strategy.

name: SA-5.13
practice_description: The organization distributes information system, system component, or information system service documentation to organization-defined personnel or roles.

name: SA-5.14
practice_description: The organization defines the personnel or roles to whom information system, system component, or information system service documentation is to be distributed.

name: SA-5.2
practice_description: The organization obtains administrator documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes secure installation of the system, component, or service.

name: SA-5.3
practice_description: The organization obtains administrator documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes secure operation of the system, component, or service.

name: SA-5.4
practice_description: The organization obtains administrator documentation for the information system, system component, or information system services that describes effective use and maintenance of security functions/mechanisms.

name: SA-5.5
practice_description: The organization obtains administrator documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes known vulnerabilities regarding configuration and use of administrative (i.e., privileged) functions.

name: SA-5.6
practice_description: The organization obtains user documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes user-accessible security functions/mechanisms and how to effectively use those security functions/mechanisms.

name: SA-5.7
practice_description: The organization obtains user documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes methods for user interaction which enables individuals to use the system, component, or service in a more secure manner.

name: SA-5.8
practice_description: The organization obtains user documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service that describes user responsibilities in maintaining the security of the system, component, or service.

name: SA-5.9
practice_description: The organization takes organization-defined actions in response to attempts to obtain either unavailable or nonexistent documentation for the information system, system component, or information system service.

name: SA-8.1
practice_description: The organization applies information system security engineering principles in the specification of the information system.

name: SA-8.2
practice_description: The organization applies information system security engineering principles in the design of the information system.

name: SA-8.3
practice_description: The organization applies information system security engineering principles in the development of the information system.

name: SA-8.4
practice_description: The organization applies information system security engineering principles in the implementation of the information system.

name: SA-8.5
practice_description: The organization applies information system security engineering principles in the modification of the information system.

capability_description: External System Services | Risk Assessments and Organizational Approvals
name: SA-9(1).1
practice_description: The organization conducts an organizational assessment of risk prior to the acquisition or outsourcing of dedicated information security services.

capability_description: External System Services | Risk Assessments and Organizational Approvals
name: SA-9(1).2
practice_description: The organization ensures that the acquisition or outsourcing of dedicated information security services is approved by organization-defined personnel or roles.

capability_description: External System Services | Risk Assessments and Organizational Approvals
name: SA-9(1).3
practice_description: The organization defines the personnel or roles authorized to approve the acquisition or outsourcing of dedicated information security services.

capability_description: External System Services | Identification of Functions, Ports, Protocols, and Services
name: SA-9(2).1
practice_description: The organization requires providers of organization-defined external information system services to identify the functions, ports, protocols, and other services required for the use of such services.

capability_description: External System Services | Identification of Functions, Ports, Protocols, and Services
name: SA-9(2).2
practice_description: The organization defines the external information system services for which the providers are required to identify the functions, ports, protocols, and other services required for the use of such services.

capability_description: External System Services | Establish and Maintain Trust Relationship with Providers
name: SA-9(3).1
practice_description: The organization establishes trust relationships with external service providers based on organization-defined security requirements, properties, factors, or conditions defining acceptable trust relationships.

capability_description: External System Services | Establish and Maintain Trust Relationship with Providers
name: SA-9(3).2
practice_description: The organization documents trust relationships with external service providers based on organization-defined security requirements, properties, factors, or conditions defining acceptable trust relationships.

capability_description: External System Services | Establish and Maintain Trust Relationship with Providers
name: SA-9(3).3
practice_description: The organization maintains trust relationships with external service providers based on organization-defined security requirements, properties, factors, or conditions defining acceptable trust relationships.

capability_description: External System Services | Establish and Maintain Trust Relationship with Providers
name: SA-9(3).4
practice_description: The organization defines security requirements, properties, factors, or conditions defining acceptable trust relationships with external service providers.

capability_description: External System Services | Consistent Interests of Consumers and Providers
name: SA-9(4).1
practice_description: The organization employs organization-defined security safeguards to ensure that the interests of organization-defined external service providers are consistent with and reflect organizational interests.

capability_description: External System Services | Consistent Interests of Consumers and Providers
name: SA-9(4).2
practice_description: The organization defines security safeguards to employ to ensure that the interests of organization-defined external service providers are consistent with and reflect organizational interests.

capability_description: External System Services | Consistent Interests of Consumers and Providers
name: SA-9(4).3
practice_description: The organization defines external service providers whose interests are consistent with and reflect organizational interests.

capability_description: External System Services | Processing, Storage, and Service Location
name: SA-9(5).1
practice_description: The organization restricts the location of information processing, information/data, and/or information system services to organization-defined locations based on organization-defined requirements or conditions.

capability_description: External System Services | Processing, Storage, and Service Location
name: SA-9(5).2
practice_description: The organization defines the locations for which to restrict information processing, information/data, and/or information system services based on organization-defined requirements or conditions.

capability_description: External System Services | Processing, Storage, and Service Location
name: SA-9(5).3
practice_description: The organization defines the requirements or conditions on which to base restricting the location of information processing, information/data, and/or information system services to organization-defined locations.

name: SA-9.1
practice_description: The organization requires that providers of external information system services comply with organizational information security requirements.

name: SA-9.2
practice_description: The organization requires that providers of external information system services employ organization-defined security controls in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, and guidance.

name: SA-9.3
practice_description: The organization defines security controls that providers of external information system services employ in accordance with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, and guidance.

name: SA-9.4
practice_description: The organization defines government oversight with regard to external information system services.

name: SA-9.5
practice_description: The organization documents government oversight with regard to external information system services.

name: SA-9.6
practice_description: The organization defines user roles and responsibilities with regard to external information system services.

name: SA-9.7
practice_description: The organization documents user roles and responsibilities with regard to external information system services.

name: SA-9.8
practice_description: The organization employs organization-defined processes, methods, and techniques to monitor security control compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis.

name: SA-9.9
practice_description: The organization defines processes, methods, and techniques to employ to monitor security control compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis.
